title: trachoma subluteum
intro: Trachoma subluteum is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the golden trefoil. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Trachoma subluteum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
